parent.title: Standout dining in and around Ghent — 2026

siblings.title: Michelin & Gault&Millau-rated tables
siblings.summary: What's starred, Bib'd or top-scored in Ghent right now: 4 Michelin stars in city limits, a 2-star benchmark 30km away, and where Gault&Millau places everything else.

siblings.title: Chef-driven & destination tables
siblings.summary: The chefs to book for in Ghent, the drive-out destinations within ~90 minutes, and the 2024–2026 openings and closures that just redrew the map.

siblings.title: Romantic & special-occasion settings
siblings.summary: Six Ghent rooms worth a big night out — from a 24-seat Michelin star in a 1671 building to candlelit canal-side warehouses.

siblings.title: Cocktail-led dining & bar-restaurants
siblings.summary: Five Ghent venues where the drinks programme is at least as serious as the food — speakeasy, hotel-bar, canal-side, rooftop, Indian sharing-plate.

siblings.title: Remarkable locations & rooms
siblings.summary: Five Ghent venues where the room is the reason: a 15th-century butchers' hall, a converted Franciscan church, a restored 1880s warehouse, a tiled former butcher shop, and the city's two real rooftops.

siblings.title: Review & rating sources to mine
siblings.summary: Which review platforms to scrape for a 'clear edge' Ghent restaurant guide, ranked by signal density.

sources.title: sakaswintercircusbe.eu — about
sources.claim: Sākas is a Japanese omakase restaurant at Lammerstraat 13 led by Yoshihito Mizuno, offering 8- or 16-course tasting menus.

sources.title: Knack Weekend — Sākas review
sources.claim: Belgian press placed Sākas inside Ghent's Wintercircus venue and rated the cooking highly on quality, freshness and seasoning.

sources.title: Gault&Millau — Sākas Gent
sources.claim: Sākas is listed in Gault&Millau Belgium's Ghent guide.

sources.title: ramen.gent — Noedelbar Ramen
sources.claim: Noedelbar Ramen at Oudburg 51 has run since December 2012, making everything in-house including noodles, broth, toppings and condiments; only 16 seats.

sources.title: goldengai.be
sources.claim: Golden Gai at Dampoortstraat 11 serves Japanese-inspired ramen and cocktails made in-house from local suppliers.

sources.title: kneestochin.com — Ghent
sources.claim: Knees to Chin (Voldersstraat 11) serves Vietnamese rice paper rolls, banh mi and bowls; lactose-free and very low gluten.

sources.title: lucychang.com — Ghent
sources.claim: Lucy Chang Ghent at Jakobijnenstraat 1 serves South-East Asian fusion in the chain's smallest, intimate canalside room.

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Kin Khao
sources.claim: Kin Khao – Thai Eatery serves Thai street food and was awarded Best Thai in Belgium / Luxembourg by Gault&Millau in 2020.

sources.title: Restaurant Guru — Kin Khao
sources.claim: Kin Khao at Donkersteeg 21/23 holds a 4.8/5 rating across 2,380 votes, with €10–€28 per person.

sources.title: heyjoo.be
sources.claim: Hey Joo at Oudburg 18 serves authentic Korean cooking with halal meat and vegan options including bibimbap.

sources.title: Wanderlog — Hey Joo
sources.claim: Hey Joo is run by a Korean couple and praised for bibimbap and a canalside garden.

sources.title: lailarestaurant.be
sources.claim: Laila Tandoori at Maria Hendrikaplein 66 serves Pakistani-Indian tandoori; chef has won three HORECA kitchen awards.

sources.title: TripAdvisor — Laila Tandoori
sources.claim: Laila Tandoori receives consistent praise on TripAdvisor for tandoori, biryani and ambience.

sources.title: mazaya.be — blog
sources.claim: Mazaya at Steendam 39 serves Syrian-Lebanese mezze (labneh, warak enab, tabouleh, falafel) made in-house.

sources.title: Tablebooker — Zahra
sources.claim: Zahra at Brabantdam 46 serves Lebanese, Syrian and Middle Eastern food in a Flemish house on the Leie.

sources.title: TripAdvisor — Mogador
sources.claim: Mogador (Mageleinstraat 8) is the standout Moroccan address in central Ghent, known for tagines, couscous royal and pastilla.

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Casa de las Tapas
sources.claim: Casa de las Tapas (Patershol, Corduwaniersstraat 41) serves Spanish tapas and paella; capacity up to 23.

sources.title: TripAdvisor — Turkish in Ghent
sources.claim: Hunkar Kebab tops Ghent's Turkish list with reviewers citing freshness and unmatched taste despite small size.

sources.title: TripAdvisor — Thai in Ghent
sources.claim: TripAdvisor's 2026 Thai-in-Ghent ranking confirms Kin Khao, Petit Thai and Lucy Chang among the top venues.

sources.title: TripAdvisor — Middle Eastern in Ghent
sources.claim: Mazaya and Zahra appear among Ghent's top-listed Middle Eastern restaurants for 2026 on TripAdvisor.
